visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a grey flat cap, tinted sunglasses, and a light green t-shirt stands on a narrow paved street. Behind him are multi-story residential buildings and tropical palm trees under a bright, overcast sky. He gestures with his hands while speaking directly to the camera. (2) The scene shifts to the man sitting in the passenger seat of a car. He is looking out the window, his expression shifting from a smile to realization. The car interior is modern with dark leather and a sunroof visible above his head. (3) The man takes off his glasses and holds them up, squinting at the lenses as if checking for damage or a prescription error. He wears several beaded bracelets on his right wrist and a yellow-strapped watch on his left. (4) An exterior shot of a storefront with a large red vertical sign reading '聯合眼鏡' (United Optical) and a smaller blue sign for 'ZEISS Vision Expert'. The building is a typical urban residential-commercial mix with air conditioning units on the facade. (5) The man pushes open a glass door with a red frame and enters a brightly lit, sterile, and modern retail environment. The floors are light-colored and the walls are lined with display cases. (6) A series of close-up shots showcase high-tech optical diagnostic equipment. A white and grey machine with a 'ZEISS' logo and an eye-piece is shown, followed by a large, futuristic-looking circular 3D positioning device with blue LED lighting. (7) The man is seen wearing a blue heated eye mask over his eyes, leaning back comfortably in a specialized testing chair. A staff member's hand is visible handing him a tissue. (8) A digital tablet displays a colorful topographic map of an eye's surface, indicating data-driven diagnostics. The man then wears a complex, white trial frame with multiple adjustable dials and lenses while looking into a vision testing machine. (9) The man stands before a minimalist wall display filled with dozens of different eyeglass frames. He reaches out to select a pair, carefully examining the hinges and frame material. (10) He stands in front of a mirror, trying on a pair of sleek, dark-rimmed glasses and adjusting his cap. A staff member in a black polo shirt with a Zeiss logo stands nearby, assisting with the selection. (11) Shots of children's eyewear sections are shown, featuring a colorful poster with an astronaut graphic and various smaller-sized frames. The lighting is consistently bright and warm throughout the store. (12) The man receives a white branded box containing his new glasses, a warranty card, and several cleaning accessories. He smiles broadly, expressing satisfaction with the final product.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我的美食地圖又來了. (2) [Variety]: 新竹. (3) [Subtitle]: 這次要帶大家來新竹. (4) [Variety]: (我算吃貨吧?). (5) [Slogan]: 好不好吃. (6) [Subtitle]: 這家真的很好吃. (7) [Variety]: 連Tim嫂都很喜歡. (8) [Subtitle]: 等一下，我好像戴錯...我戴成舊的眼鏡了耶. (9) [Variety]: (出!大!包!) 散光度數不不夠!!. (10) [Slogan]: 不可能. (11) [Subtitle]: 不管是近視遠視還是散光，只要其中一樣度數不不夠，就不能開車，很危險. (12) [Slogan]: 聯合眼鏡護眼旗艦店. (13) [Slogan]: 蔡司優視力專家. (14) [Subtitle]: 擁有原廠認證的配鏡空間與全套設備. (15) [Variety]: 這個厲害了! (16) [Variety]: (這是什麼高科技?). (17) [Variety]: 黑科技 蔡司3D定位儀. (18) [Subtitle]: 中心定位是直接用這台黑科技的蔡司3D定位儀來幫我對焦，不需要人工耶!. (19) [Subtitle]: 哇!第一次遇到配眼鏡前需要熱敷. (20) [Variety]: 5 ways 精準量測. (21) [Subtitle]: 透過蔡司優視力體驗，五步驟精準量測，數位化配鏡流程，找到你個人專屬數據. (22) [Variety]: 自覺式數位驗光系統. (23) [Variety]: (流程超快又精準). (24) [Subtitle]: 利用蔡司高階數位科技設備，流程超快又精準，不用跟以前一樣拿湯匙遮眼睛. (25) [Subtitle]: 這裡的德式配鏡體驗服務非常專業又完整. (26) [Variety]: 新竹/苗栗. (27) [Variety]: (擁有最多優視力專家的眼鏡店). (28) [Subtitle]: 擁有台灣最齊全、最多樣式的蔡司鏡框店中店，提供全方面視力解決方案. (29) [Variety]: GD的感覺. (30) [Subtitle]: 這款戴起來像不像GD的感覺. (31) [Subtitle]: 不只大人配鏡有逛精品店的感覺，小朋友也是有尊榮待遇. (32) [Variety]: 尊榮待遇. (33) [Subtitle]: 提供新竹地區小朋友配鏡，全齡層最全面的視力保健服務. (34) [Variety]: (快速、精準又專業). (35) [Subtitle]: 你看!我都特別從台北跑來新竹聯合眼鏡護眼旗艦店配了. (36) [Variety]: 完成的眼鏡+原廠盒. (37) [Variety]: 保固卡X1. (38) [Variety]: 護眼拭鏡片X50. (39) [Variety]: 護眼罩X1. (40) [Variety]: 聯合眼鏡X蔡司精美禮盒. (41) [Variety]: (導演: 所以可以吃美食了嗎). [Slogan]: 聯合眼鏡有夠讚的啦!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim), 1 male staff member, 1 female visible on a digital screen/poster.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian male, wearing a grey flat cap, tinted sunglasses (later clear glasses), a light green t-shirt with 'ROOTS' branding, and multiple beaded bracelets.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts on a city street with residential blocks. It transitions to the interior of a car with a sunroof, and finally to a high-end, modern optical store with white shelving, minimalist wooden cabinets, and sophisticated medical equipment.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an energetic male voice greeting the audience over an upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop BGM. The voice is clear, bright, and exhibits a high arousal level. The BGM has a consistent 4/4 beat with synthetic textures. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect transitions the audio as the speaker moves into a car. There is a slight shift in acoustics to a more enclosed space, though the vocal clarity remains high. The BGM continues at a steady volume underneath. (3) A loud 'ding' sound effect emphasizes a moment of realization in the speech. The speaker's tone becomes more exaggerated and comedic. Background noise is minimal, with high SNR. (4) As the speaker enters the store, a transition 'pop' sound is heard. The ambient noise floor becomes very quiet, typical of a studio or professional indoor space. A new male voice, deeper and more authoritative but friendly, joins the conversation briefly. (5) Mechanical whirring and high-frequency 'beeps' from medical equipment are audible during the eye examination sequence. These SFX are crisp and integrated into the mix for emphasis. The BGM maintains its tempo throughout. (6) The video concludes with a celebratory 'stinger' sound effect and the original male voice speaking with high valence and dominance, thanking the shop. The sound of a paper bag rustling and items being placed in a box is heard with moderate percussiveness.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Problem -> Solution -> Evidence -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional vlog for 'United Optical' (聯合眼鏡) and 'ZEISS Vision Expert' services in Hsinchu. It begins with a relatable hook (going for food) that is interrupted by a vision problem (wearing the wrong glasses). This leads to a detailed walkthrough of the high-tech Zeiss examination process, emphasizing precision, technology, and customer service. The intent is to encourage viewers to visit these professional vision centers for their own eye care needs.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video focuses on the services and products offered at the Zeiss Vision Expert store, with explicit naming of brands and features.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses fast-paced editing and variety-show style text to maintain high engagement, common in social media marketing.
